pageContext.name: Boba Fett (The Mandalorian Version)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai are proud to present the Boba Fett (The Mandalorian Version) Model Kit!  This stunningly detailed 1:12 scale model joins the Bandai Spirits line standing at six inches tall and includes a selection of blasters, swap out hands to hold them, as well as an unmasked portrait of the bounty hunter himself.  Be sure to add this Model Kit to your Star Wars collection!
